parameters.description: Send notifications to your own PopcornNotify destination through the UnitySVC gateway. POST the unified message envelope {title, body, type, format}; the gateway composes an Apprise popcorn:// URL from your stored secrets and delivers via apprise.unitysvc.dev. The free apprise channel uses your own stored credentials; the apprise-plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters. The gateway/gateway-plus channels transform the envelope directly into a PopcornNotify notify form payload and post it to api.popcornnotify.com (no Apprise).
parameters.gateway_body_template: message={* _escape_json((_body.title or "")..(((_body.title or "")~="" and (_body.body or "")~="") and ": " or "")..(_body.body or "")) *}&recipients=${ customer_secrets.POPCORNNOTIFY_RECIPIENTS }
parameters.gateway_plus_price_description: $0.001 per message — extra per-enrollment PopcornNotify recipients, direct
parameters.gateway_price_description: Free — direct to your PopcornNotify recipients (no Apprise)

apikey_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's PopcornNotify apikey

targets_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's PopcornNotify targets
